criteria_verification.evidence: NATSKVManifestRegistry subclasses ManifestRegistry and implements all 6 abstract methods. mypy --strict passes with zero errors. Seam tests test_is_subclass_of_manifest_registry and test_instance_is_manifest_registry verify this.
criteria_verification.notes: NATSKVManifestRegistry subclasses ManifestRegistry and implements all 6 abstract methods. mypy --strict passes with zero errors. Seam tests test_is_subclass_of_manifest_registry and test_instance_is_manifest_registry verify this.

criteria_verification.evidence: register() calls self._kv.put(manifest.agent_id, payload) where payload is model_dump_json().encode(). Tests test_register_puts_manifest_as_json_bytes and test_register_upserts_on_re_registration verify the key is agent_id and put is called on each register.
criteria_verification.notes: register() calls self._kv.put(manifest.agent_id, payload) where payload is model_dump_json().encode(). Tests test_register_puts_manifest_as_json_bytes and test_register_upserts_on_re_registration verify the key is agent_id and put is called on each register.

criteria_verification.evidence: register() checks 'if not manifest.intents' and raises ValueError('at least one intent capability is required') before calling kv.put. Test test_register_raises_value_error_if_intents_empty verifies ValueError is raised and kv.put is not called.
criteria_verification.notes: register() checks 'if not manifest.intents' and raises ValueError('at least one intent capability is required') before calling kv.put. Test test_register_raises_value_error_if_intents_empty verifies ValueError is raised and kv.put is not called.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `NATSKVManifestRegistry.deregister()` is idempotent — `kv.delete()` failure is silently logged, not raised
criteria_verification.evidence: deregister() wraps kv.delete() in try/except Exception and logs via logger.debug. Test test_deregister_is_idempotent_on_key_not_found verifies that Exception from kv.delete does not propagate and the agent_id appears in log output.
criteria_verification.notes: deregister() wraps kv.delete() in try/except Exception and logs via logger.debug. Test test_deregister_is_idempotent_on_key_not_found verifies that Exception from kv.delete does not propagate and the agent_id appears in log output.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `NATSKVManifestRegistry.get()` returns `None` if key not found (catches all KV exceptions)
criteria_verification.evidence: get() wraps kv.get() and model_validate_json() in try/except Exception, returning None on any failure. Tests test_get_returns_none_for_missing_key (KeyError) and test_get_returns_none_on_any_exception (generic Exception) verify this.
criteria_verification.notes: get() wraps kv.get() and model_validate_json() in try/except Exception, returning None on any failure. Tests test_get_returns_none_for_missing_key (KeyError) and test_get_returns_none_on_any_exception (generic Exception) verify this.

criteria_verification.evidence: list_all() wraps kv.keys() and per-key get() calls in try/except Exception, logging a warning and returning empty list. Test test_list_all_returns_empty_on_kv_unavailable verifies empty list is returned when keys() raises Exception.
criteria_verification.notes: list_all() wraps kv.keys() and per-key get() calls in try/except Exception, logging a warning and returning empty list. Test test_list_all_returns_empty_on_kv_unavailable verifies empty list is returned when keys() raises Exception.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `NATSKVManifestRegistry.create()` classmethod creates bucket if it does not exist
criteria_verification.evidence: create() classmethod calls nc.jetstream().create_key_value(bucket=AGENT_REGISTRY_BUCKET) and returns cls(kv). Tests test_create_calls_create_key_value and test_create_returns_registry_with_kv verify the bucket name is 'agent-registry' and the returned registry is functional.
criteria_verification.notes: create() classmethod calls nc.jetstream().create_key_value(bucket=AGENT_REGISTRY_BUCKET) and returns cls(kv). Tests test_create_calls_create_key_value and test_create_returns_registry_with_kv verify the bucket name is 'agent-registry' and the returned registry is functional.
